_comment: Cave World Void (洞府虚空) — the default biome of the Cave World's inter-planetary space. Canon: the vast darkness between cultivation planets inside the sealed realm. The ground consists of fragmented floating islands of condensed spiritual energy (end stone stand-in). Sky is perpetually dark with dim purple fog (the seal's influence). No vegetation, no structures — this is empty space. Only the strongest cultivators (Soul Transformation+) can survive here unprotected. Features: occasional end_gateway-like rift tears where boundary is thin. Mobs: soul fragments (enderman stand-in). Category: THEEND for end-like generation with floating islands.
